response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong alignment with the Staff Software Engineer role, particularly in distributed systems, AI-driven development, and technical strategy. His recent work at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and code generation, which is a critical must-have for this role. His experience spans high-throughput systems, full-stack development, and operational ownership, though his exposure to AI-native environments is relatively recent.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-driven engineering (MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq).
Proven expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures (e.g., Sociomantic, Optilyz).
Strong operational ownership and cross-functional collaboration (e.g., pricing team at Optilyz, dev-ops at Altom).
concerns: Limited tenure in AI-native environments (only since April 2025 at re:cinq).
Breadth of technical experience may dilute depth in some areas (e.g., mixed language background).
No explicit mention of on-call or incident-response experience in recent roles.
